acid-extractor.name: Sulfur Extractor
acid-extractor.description: Used to extract Sulfur. Can be placed only on Sulfur deposits. Cannot be placed when corrosive gases are present.

assembler.name: Assembler
assembler.description: Intermediate production building. Utilises nanoscale printing to make Products.

crafter.name: Fabricator
crafter.description: Basic production building. Utilises nanoscale printing to make Products.

crafter-tier2.name: Fabricator v.2
crafter-tier2.description: Improved basic production building. Utilizes nanoscale printing to make Products. Offers optimized recipes designed for higher production output.

factory.name: Constructorizer
factory.description: Advanced production building. Utilizes nanoscale printing to make Products.

factory-tier2.name: Constructorizer v.2
factory-tier2.description: Improved advanced production building. Utilizes nanoscale printing to make Products. Offers optimized recipes designed for higher production output.

furnace.name: Furnace
furnace.description: Basic production building. Utilises heat to make Products.

furnace-tier2.name: Furnace v.2
furnace-tier2.description: Improved basic production building. Utilizes heat to make Products. Offers optimized recipes designed for higher production output.

gas-extractor.name: Helium-3 Extractor
gas-extractor.description: Used to extract Helium-3. Can be placed only on Helium-3 deposits.

hammer.name: Mega Press
hammer.description: Intermediate production building. Utilises high speed machining to make Products.

laser-drill.name: Laser Drill
laser-drill.description: Used to extract advanced ores. Can be placed only on Goethite deposits.

liquid-extractor.name: Oil Extractor
liquid-extractor.description: Used to extract Powerium. Can be placed only on Powerium deposits.

mechanical-drill.name: Ore Excavator
mechanical-drill.description: Crucial during the early phase of the mission. Used to extract basic ores. Can be placed only on Titanium, Wolfram, and Calcium deposits.

mechanical-drill-tier2.name: Ore Excavator v.2
mechanical-drill-tier2.description: An improved version of the Ore Excavator offering higher extraction rates. Can be placed only on Titanium, Wolfram, and Calcium deposits.

military-assembler.name: Wytwarzacz
military-assembler.description: Advanced production building. Utilizes high speed machining to make Products.

refinery.name: Refinery
refinery.description: Refines raw Helium and Sulphur into Products.

smelter.name: Smelter
smelter.description: Refines raw Titanium, Wolfram, and Calcium into Products.

synthetizer.name: Compounder
synthetizer.description: Intermediate production building. Utilises chemical reactions to make Products.

synthetizer-tier2.name: Compounder v.2
synthetizer-tier2.description: Improved intermediate production building. Utilizes chemical reactions to make Products. Offers optimized recipes designed for higher production output.

starting.name: Training Corporation
starting.description: Fictional corporation. We won’t let you deal with the real ones for now.

ui.transport.default_message: Default rail tier speeds for planner recommendations.
